steps.title: Use the context
steps.content: The game was an anonymous act of political protest against an authoritarian regime. Distribution under those conditions had to be secret. The contrast ("now readily available") confirms the original distribution was hidden.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank describes how copies of the game were originally distributed — the contrast "now readily available" implies the original distribution was the opposite: hidden. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — succinctly: briefly and clearly — describes communication style, not the manner of physical or digital distribution; irrelevant to secrecy. ✘
  • Choice B — dispassionately: without strong emotion — describes emotional tone, not the covert nature required for distributing anti-regime material. ✘
  • Choice C — surreptitiously: secretly, in a way meant to avoid detection — fits perfectly; distributing a protest game under an authoritarian regime required hiding it from authorities. ✔
  • Choice D — disingenuously: in an insincere or deceptive way — describes dishonest intent in communication, not the physical concealment needed when distributing banned material. ✘
That matches Choice C — surreptitiously.
